requirement_topic.en: Market Access, Ministry of Industry Import Conformity, and Entry Ports
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入、工业部进口符合性与入境口岸
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入、工業部進口符合性與入境口岸

summary.en: Morocco applies a Ministry of Industry import-conformity framework for regulated power tools. The importer of record in Morocco is the practical responsible party for filing, traceability, and customs release sequencing. In-market clearance is commonly handled through Casablanca and Tanger Med ports, where non-attested regulated products can be stopped at entry.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥对受监管电动工具实施工业部进口符合性制度。在摩进口商是实际责任方，承担申报、追溯和清关节点安排。卡萨布兰卡和丹吉尔地中海港（Tanger Med）为常见入境口岸，不合规货物可能在口岸被阻拦。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥對受監管電動工具實施工業部進口符合性制度。在摩進口商是實際責任方，承擔申報、追溯和清關節點安排。卡薩布蘭卡和丹吉爾地中海港（Tanger Med）為常見入境港口，不合規貨物可能在口岸被阻攔。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Industry import-conformity regime for regulated electrical products
Casablanca and Tanger Med customs entry controls

summary.en: Chinese documents typically cover PRC export declaration, invoices, and technical files tied to GB/T 3883 and CCC scope. These remain China-side deliverables and do not substitute for a Moroccan import-conformity process controlled by the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常覆盖中国报关、发票和基于GB/T 3883与CCC范围的技术文件，这些属于中国侧交付物，不能替代由在摩进口商主导的摩洛哥进口符合性程序。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常覆蓋中國報關、發票和基於GB/T 3883與CCC範圍的技術文件，這些屬於中國側交付物，不能替代由在摩進口商主導的摩洛哥進口符合性程序。

standards_or_laws: CCC and Chinese export customs filing framework

gap.en: The common gap is not only technical but legal-persona. A technically ready tool set can still fail to enter the market if there is no Morocco-resident importer or if the import file is not prepared for Ministry of Industry attestation and port sequencing.
gap.zh: 差距不仅在技术层面，也在法定主体层面。即使技术上准备充分，如果没有在摩常驻进口商或未按工业部认证程序和口岸节奏准备进口文件，也可能无法入场。
gap.zht: 差距不僅在技術層面，也在法定主體層面。即使技術上準備充分，如果沒有在摩常駐進口商或未按工業部認證程序和口岸節奏準備進口文件，也可能無法入場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated power tools. In-country importer and Ministry of Industry import-conformity attestation are required for market access and customs release path.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese domestic scope where GB/T 3883 and CCC apply.

source.publisher: Morocco Ministry of Industry and Trade

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Morocco-ready as-is if market filing, importer responsibility, and customs-sequence planning for Casablanca or Tanger Med are not handled through the Ministry of Industry attestation workflow before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若未在出货前通过工业部认证流程完成市场备案、进口商责任安排及卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔港清关节奏安排，不应视为摩洛哥就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若未於出貨前透過工業部認證流程完成市場備案、進口商責任安排及卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾港清關節奏安排，不應視為摩洛哥就緒。
